arts.ttl: Crvena Zvezda vs. Stuttgart preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Wednesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Crvena Zvezda and VfB Stuttgart, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Red Star Belgrade vs. VfB Stuttgart: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Buoyed by a welcome weekend victory in the Bundesliga, VfB Stuttgart will seek to transfer their winning ways to the UEFA Champions League away at Red Star Belgrade on Wednesday (kick-off: 6.45pm CET). Despite that, Serbia's champions will point to a good home record against Bundesliga opponents, with Red Star boasting 11 wins and five draws in 20 games against German teams at their famed Rajko Mitić Stadium, which is locally known as the Maracana.
